requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy-Efficiency Label — Household Refrigerators (SANS 941 / NRCS compulsory labelling)
requirement_topic.zh: 强制能效标签——家用电冰箱（SANS 941 / NRCS强制标识）
requirement_topic.zht: 強制能效標籤——家用電冰箱（SANS 941 / NRCS強制標識）

summary.en: South Africa operates a compulsory energy-efficiency labelling scheme for household appliances under SANS 941 (Energy efficiency of electrical and electronic apparatus), implemented through Compulsory Specification VC 9008 and administered by the NRCS together with the Department of Mineral Resources and Energy. Household refrigerators, freezers, and combination appliances must carry the South African energy-efficiency label, which displays an A-to-G efficiency rating (an EU-style rescaled label adopted for the South African market), the annual energy consumption in kWh, and model details. The energy class is determined by testing to the SANS adoption of the IEC 62552 measurement series. The supplier (in-country importer) is responsible for affixing a compliant label before the product is offered for sale, including in retail and online listings. Energy data and the label artwork form part of the documentation reviewed in the NRCS process.
summary.zh: 南非依据SANS 941（电气和电子设备的能源效率）实施家用电器强制能效标识制度，通过强制规范VC 9008落实，由NRCS会同矿产资源和能源部管理。家用电冰箱、冷冻箱及组合器具须带有南非能效标签，标注A至G能效评级（为南非市场采用的欧盟式重新评级标签）、以千瓦时计的年耗电量及型号信息。能效等级依据SANS采纳的IEC 62552测量系列检测确定。供应商（在地进口商）须在产品发售前（含零售和在线列表）加贴合规标签。能效数据和标签图样属于NRCS流程审查文件的一部分。
summary.zht: 南非依據SANS 941（電氣和電子設備的能源效率）實施家用電器強制能效標識制度，通過強制規範VC 9008落實，由NRCS會同礦產資源和能源部管理。家用電冰箱、冷凍箱及組合器具須帶有南非能效標籤，標注A至G能效評級（為南非市場採用的歐盟式重新評級標籤）、以千瓦時計的年耗電量及型號資訊。能效等級依據SANS採納的IEC 62552測量系列檢測確定。供應商（在地進口商）須在產品發售前（含零售和線上列表）加貼合規標籤。能效數據和標籤圖樣屬於NRCS流程審查文件的一部分。

standards_or_laws: SANS 941 — Energy efficiency of electrical and electronic apparatus (energy-efficiency labelling base standard)
Compulsory Specification VC 9008 — Compulsory specification for energy efficiency and labelling of electrical and electronic apparatus (NRCS-administered)
SANS IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (energy measurement basis)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency framework for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), enforced under the China Energy Label (CEL) system administered by NDRC/SAMR. It uses a 1-to-5 grade scale (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption limits, with the China Energy Label displayed before domestic sale. Energy measurement aligns with the IEC 62552 series via GB/T 8059. While both China and South Africa anchor their energy measurement on IEC 62552, the South African A-to-G rescaled label and class boundaries differ from China's 1-to-5 grade system, so the rating cannot be carried across without recalculation to the South African scale.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制能效框架为GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），在由NDRC/SAMR管理的中国能效标识（CEL）制度下执行。采用1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量限值，并在境内销售前展示中国能效标识。能效测量通过GB/T 8059与IEC 62552系列对齐。虽然中国和南非的能效测量均以IEC 62552为基础，但南非A至G重新评级标签及等级界限不同于中国1至5级体系，故评级未经按南非评级重新计算不可直接沿用。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制能效框架為GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），在由NDRC/SAMR管理的中國能效標識（CEL）制度下執行。採用1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量限值，並在境內銷售前展示中國能效標識。能效測量通過GB/T 8059與IEC 62552系列對齊。雖然中國和南非的能效測量均以IEC 62552為基礎，但南非A至G重新評級標籤及等級界限不同於中國1至5級體系，故評級未經按南非評級重新計算不可直接沿用。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; China Energy Label under NDRC/SAMR)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two structural gaps exist: (1) Different label scale — South Africa uses an A-to-G rescaled energy label under SANS 941, while China uses a 1-to-5 grade. A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not map directly to a South African A or B class; the energy class must be recalculated to the South African boundaries from IEC 62552 measurement data. (2) Mandatory re-labelling and documentation — the South African energy-efficiency label (artwork and content) must be affixed by the in-country importer before sale; the China Energy Label cannot serve as the South African label. The energy data and label must be available to the NRCS as part of the compulsory labelling regime (VC 9008). Although both regimes share the IEC 62552 measurement basis, existing Chinese test reports may need to be re-formatted or re-issued to satisfy SANS scope and the South African rating boundaries.
gap.zh: 存在两项结构性差距：（1）标签评级不同——南非依据SANS 941采用A至G重新评级能效标签，而中国采用1至5级。中国1级或2级评级不能直接对应南非A或B级；能效等级须依据IEC 62552测量数据按南非界限重新计算。（2）强制重新贴标和文件——南非能效标签（图样和内容）须由在地进口商在销售前加贴；中国能效标识不能充当南非标签。能效数据和标签须作为强制标识制度（VC 9008）的一部分提供给NRCS。尽管两套制度共享IEC 62552测量基础，现有中国检测报告可能须重新编排或重新出具以满足SANS范围和南非评级界限。
gap.zht: 存在兩項結構性差距：（1）標籤評級不同——南非依據SANS 941採用A至G重新評級能效標籤，而中國採用1至5級。中國1級或2級評級不能直接對應南非A或B級；能效等級須依據IEC 62552測量數據按南非界限重新計算。（2）強制重新貼標和文件——南非能效標籤（圖樣和內容）須由在地進口商在銷售前加貼；中國能效標識不能充當南非標籤。能效數據和標籤須作為強制標識制度（VC 9008）的一部分提供給NRCS。儘管兩套制度共享IEC 62552測量基礎，現有中國檢測報告可能須重新編排或重新出具以滿足SANS範圍和南非評級界限。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the South African energy-efficiency label under SANS 941 / VC 9008 is compulsory for household refrigerators before sale; administered by NRCS and the Department of Mineral Resources and Energy
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by NDRC/SAMR

source.publisher: NRCS — National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (South Africa)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The South African energy-efficiency label (SANS 941 / VC 9008) is a compulsory market requirement for household refrigerators. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades and the China Energy Label do not substitute — the energy class must be recalculated to the South African A-to-G scale from IEC 62552 data and a compliant South African label affixed by the importer before sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非能效标签（SANS 941 / VC 9008）是家用电冰箱的强制市场要求。中国GB 12021.2等级和中国能效标识不能替代——能效等级须依据IEC 62552数据按南非A至G评级重新计算，并由进口商在销售前加贴合规南非标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非能效標籤（SANS 941 / VC 9008）是家用電冰箱的強制市場要求。中國GB 12021.2等級和中國能效標識不能替代——能效等級須依據IEC 62552數據按南非A至G評級重新計算，並由進口商在銷售前加貼合規南非標籤。

requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) — Household Refrigerators (South Africa)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准（MEPS）——家用电冰箱（南非）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準（MEPS）——家用電冰箱（南非）

summary.en: Alongside the energy label, South Africa applies Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) to household refrigerating appliances. MEPS set a floor on allowable energy consumption (a maximum Energy Efficiency Index / minimum class), meaning that appliances below the threshold class may not be placed on the South African market at all, regardless of labelling. The MEPS thresholds are defined within the SANS 941 framework and the related Department of Mineral Resources and Energy regulations and are referenced in the compulsory specification (VC 9008) enforced by the NRCS. An appliance that merely carries a label but fails to meet the minimum performance class is non-compliant. Energy performance is determined by testing to the SANS adoption of the IEC 62552 series. Because South Africa progressively tightens MEPS to drive efficiency, exporters must confirm the current threshold in force at the time of placement.
summary.zh: 除能效标签外，南非对家用制冷器具实施最低能效标准（MEPS）。MEPS规定允许耗电量的下限（最高能效指数／最低等级），即低于门槛等级的器具无论是否贴标均不得投放南非市场。MEPS门槛在SANS 941框架及矿产资源和能源部相关法规内界定，并在由NRCS执行的强制规范（VC 9008）中引用。仅贴有标签但未达最低能效等级的器具属不合规。能效依据SANS采纳的IEC 62552系列检测确定。由于南非逐步收紧MEPS以推动节能，出口商须确认投放时现行的门槛值。
summary.zht: 除能效標籤外，南非對家用製冷器具實施最低能效標準（MEPS）。MEPS規定允許耗電量的下限（最高能效指數／最低等級），即低於門檻等級的器具無論是否貼標均不得投放南非市場。MEPS門檻在SANS 941框架及礦產資源和能源部相關法規內界定，並在由NRCS執行的強制規範（VC 9008）中引用。僅貼有標籤但未達最低能效等級的器具屬不合規。能效依據SANS採納的IEC 62552系列檢測確定。由於南非逐步收緊MEPS以推動節能，出口商須確認投放時現行的門檻值。

standards_or_laws: SANS 941 — Energy efficiency of electrical and electronic apparatus (MEPS thresholds and classes)
Compulsory Specification VC 9008 — energy efficiency and labelling of electrical and electronic apparatus (NRCS-enforced minimum performance gate)
SANS IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for determining energy performance / class

summary.en: China's equivalent floor is the minimum allowable value of energy efficiency (Grade 5 boundary) defined in GB 12021.2, below which a household refrigerator may not be manufactured for or sold on the domestic Chinese market. This functions as China's MEPS, enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label system, with measurement aligned to IEC 62552 via GB/T 8059. The minimum allowable value and grade boundaries in GB 12021.2 are set on a Chinese 1-to-5 scale and Chinese reference formulas; they differ numerically from the South African MEPS / class boundaries under SANS 941. A model that just meets the Chinese Grade 5 minimum may fall below the South African minimum class, and vice versa, so compliance cannot be inferred from the Chinese grade alone.
summary.zh: 中国的同类下限为GB 12021.2规定的能效限定值（5级界限），低于该值的家用电冰箱不得在中国境内生产或销售。该限值即中国的MEPS，由SAMR在中国能效标识制度下执行，测量通过GB/T 8059与IEC 62552对齐。GB 12021.2的限定值和等级界限按中国1至5级及中国参考公式设定，与南非SANS 941下的MEPS／等级界限在数值上不同。仅勉强达到中国5级最低值的型号可能低于南非最低等级，反之亦然，故不能仅凭中国等级推断合规性。
summary.zht: 中國的同類下限為GB 12021.2規定的能效限定值（5級界限），低於該值的家用電冰箱不得在中國境內生產或銷售。該限值即中國的MEPS，由SAMR在中國能效標識制度下執行，測量通過GB/T 8059與IEC 62552對齊。GB 12021.2的限定值和等級界限按中國1至5級及中國參考公式設定，與南非SANS 941下的MEPS／等級界限在數值上不同。僅勉強達到中國5級最低值的型號可能低於南非最低等級，反之亦然，故不能僅憑中國等級推斷合規性。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — minimum allowable value of energy efficiency (Grade 5 boundary functions as China MEPS; enforced by SAMR)
GB/T 8059-2016 — household refrigerating appliances test method (IEC 62552 aligned)

gap.en: The gap is a hard market-access floor, not just a label difference: (1) A refrigerator that meets only the Chinese minimum (Grade 5) may fail the South African MEPS minimum class and be barred from market placement entirely, even with a label affixed. (2) Class boundaries differ — South African MEPS thresholds under SANS 941 are set on the A-to-G rescaled scale with South African reference parameters, so energy performance must be re-evaluated against the South African floor using IEC 62552 data. (3) Tightening schedule — South Africa periodically raises MEPS; an exporter must verify the threshold in force at the time of placement, as a model compliant under an earlier threshold may later be disqualified. Exporters should obtain or commission energy measurement to the SANS IEC 62552 series and confirm the resulting class clears the current South African MEPS before committing inventory.
gap.zh: 该差距是硬性市场准入下限，而不仅是标签差异：（1）仅达到中国最低（5级）的电冰箱可能不符合南非MEPS最低等级，即使已贴标也会被完全禁止投放市场。（2）等级界限不同——南非SANS 941下的MEPS门槛按A至G重新评级及南非参考参数设定，故须使用IEC 62552数据按南非下限重新评估能效。（3）收紧时间表——南非定期提高MEPS；出口商须核实投放时现行门槛，因为按早期门槛合规的型号日后可能被取消资格。出口商应取得或委托按SANS IEC 62552系列进行的能效测量，并在投入库存前确认所得等级达到现行南非MEPS。
gap.zht: 該差距是硬性市場准入下限，而不僅是標籤差異：（1）僅達到中國最低（5級）的電冰箱可能不符合南非MEPS最低等級，即使已貼標也會被完全禁止投放市場。（2）等級界限不同——南非SANS 941下的MEPS門檻按A至G重新評級及南非參考參數設定，故須使用IEC 62552數據按南非下限重新評估能效。（3）收緊時間表——南非定期提高MEPS；出口商須核實投放時現行門檻，因為按早期門檻合規的型號日後可能被取消資格。出口商應取得或委託按SANS IEC 62552系列進行的能效測量，並在投入庫存前確認所得等級達到現行南非MEPS。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MEPS under SANS 941 / VC 9008 is a hard market-access floor; refrigerators below the minimum class may not be placed on the South African market, enforced by NRCS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 minimum allowable value (Grade 5 boundary) is the domestic floor below which refrigerators may not be sold in China; enforced by SAMR

source.publisher: Department of Mineral Resources and Energy (South Africa)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South African MEPS under SANS 941 / VC 9008 is a hard market-access gate independent of labelling. Meeting only the Chinese GB 12021.2 minimum (Grade 5) does not guarantee passing the South African minimum class. Energy performance must be re-evaluated to the South African scale from IEC 62552 data, against the MEPS threshold in force at placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非SANS 941 / VC 9008下的MEPS是独立于标识的硬性市场准入门槛。仅达到中国GB 12021.2最低值（5级）不保证通过南非最低等级。能效须依据IEC 62552数据按南非评级重新评估，对照投放时现行的MEPS门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非SANS 941 / VC 9008下的MEPS是獨立於標識的硬性市場准入門檻。僅達到中國GB 12021.2最低值（5級）不保證通過南非最低等級。能效須依據IEC 62552數據按南非評級重新評估，對照投放時現行的MEPS門檻。
